SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (32977530.pdf)
SUMMARY: Ethical, team-oriented, and policy-driven individual with experience in AP/AR, HR administration, auditing, documentation, property management (96 units), and a vast number of computer skills.
SKILLS: Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Customer Service, Microsoft Suite, SAP, Solomon, Quickbooks

SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Clerk
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 04/2015 to 06/2015
DESCRIPTION: Managed receptionist area, including greeting visitors and responding to requests. Made copies, sent faxes, organized files, developed spreadsheets.

SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
JOB TITLE: Accounts Payable Clerk
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 02/2014 to 03/2014
DESCRIPTION: Received and verified invoices, prepared batches for data entry. Managed weekly check mailings, maintained vendor files.

SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
JOB TITLE: Accounts Payable Clerk
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 12/2013 to 02/2014
DESCRIPTION: Audited Sprint bills, performed calculations in Excel. Developed auditing procedure.

SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
JOB TITLE: AP/AR Clerk
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 07/2013 to 11/2013
DESCRIPTION: Executed reporting enhancements and reconciliation procedures. Processed vendor invoice payments.

SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
JOB TITLE: Accounts Receivable Specialist III
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 08/2000 to 06/2011
DESCRIPTION: Posted invoices, resolved discrepancies. Managed high-volume customer calls.

SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
JOB TITLE: Apartment Manager/Leasing
COMPANY: Tipton Management - Pine Lake Village Apartments
DATES: 08/1999 to 12/2000
DESCRIPTION: Managed 96% occupancy. Paid bills, completed move-ins and outs.

SOURCE: 32977530.pdf
DEGREE: BSBA: Human Resource Management
